lighting.shadow_character: Soft-edged shadows that define the food's form and add depth

composition.focus_point: Fillings and cheese of the frontmost taco
composition.composition_rule: Diagonal Composition, Leading Line, Rule of Thirds

texture.detail_rendering: Excellent rendering of textures, maximizing the tactile feel of ingredients like the crispy shell and meat.

improvement_notes: 조명: 피사체 오른쪽 뒷편에 림 라이트를 추가하여 실루엣을 배경과 분리하고 입체감을 극대화할 수 있음. 색감: 섀도우의 틸(청록) 색감을 줄여 더 클래식하고 자연스러운 톤을 고려할 수 있음. 구도: 라임 조각이나 소스 볼 등 소품을 추가하는 '내러티브 스타일링'으로 사진에 생동감과 스토리를 더할 수 있음.
nano_banana_prompt: professional food photography of [FOOD NAME], close-up shot from a 45-degree angle, placed on a rustic dark ceramic plate on a dark textured wooden table. Dramatic back-left soft lighting creating deep, soft shadows and warm golden highlights. Cinematic and warm atmosphere, Teal and Orange color grading. Shallow depth of field with a beautifully blurred background. Highly detailed texture, style of Kodak Portra 400 film. --ar 9:19 --style raw --q 2
